item.title: Building a Custom Propane Forge
item.description: A blacksmith builds a propane forge from raw materials, assembling the burner system and forge body for efficient metalworking and heat control.

media:content.media:title: Building a Custom Propane Forge
media:content.media:description: A blacksmith builds a propane forge from raw materials, assembling the burner system and forge body for efficient metalworking and heat control.

item.title: Forging a Handmade Corkscrew
item.description: A blacksmith forges a functional corkscrew by heating, twisting, and shaping steel using traditional metalworking techniques.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Handmade Corkscrew
media:content.media:description: A blacksmith forges a functional corkscrew by heating, twisting, and shaping steel using traditional metalworking techniques.

item.title: Getting Started With Simple Forging
item.description: A beginner-friendly forging project demonstrates basic blacksmithing techniques, tool handling, and simple metal shaping methods.

media:content.media:title: Getting Started With Simple Forging
media:content.media:description: A beginner-friendly forging project demonstrates basic blacksmithing techniques, tool handling, and simple metal shaping methods.

item.title: Making Handles for a Forged Drawknife
item.description: A blacksmith fits and shapes wooden handles for a handmade drawknife, focusing on balance, grip, and traditional tool craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Making Handles for a Forged Drawknife
media:content.media:description: A blacksmith fits and shapes wooden handles for a handmade drawknife, focusing on balance, grip, and traditional tool craftsmanship.

item.title: Forging a Bell From a Gas Cylinder
item.description: A blacksmith transforms a recycled gas cylinder into a functional metal bell using cutting, shaping, and traditional forging techniques.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Bell From a Gas Cylinder
media:content.media:description: A blacksmith transforms a recycled gas cylinder into a functional metal bell using cutting, shaping, and traditional forging techniques.

item.title: Blacksmithing Inspired by Forged in Fire
item.description: A blacksmith demonstrates blade-making and metalworking techniques inspired by competitive forging challenges and traditional craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Blacksmithing Inspired by Forged in Fire
media:content.media:description: A blacksmith demonstrates blade-making and metalworking techniques inspired by competitive forging challenges and traditional craftsmanship.

item.title: Forging Angle Iron Container
item.description: A blacksmithing project showing how angle iron is shaped and forged into a functional container, highlighting traditional metalworking techniques and craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Forging Angle Iron Container
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing project showing how angle iron is shaped and forged into a functional container, highlighting traditional metalworking techniques and craftsmanship.

item.title: Forging an Essential Vise
item.description: A blacksmithing project demonstrating how a functional vise is forged, showcasing precision metalwork, tool-making skills, and traditional shop craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Forging an Essential Vise
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing project demonstrating how a functional vise is forged, showcasing precision metalwork, tool-making skills, and traditional shop craftsmanship.

item.title: Building an Adjustable Forged Tool
item.description: A blacksmithing project showing the design and forging of an adjustable tool, highlighting precision craftsmanship, metal shaping, and traditional fabrication techniques.

media:content.media:title: Building an Adjustable Forged Tool
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing project showing the design and forging of an adjustable tool, highlighting precision craftsmanship, metal shaping, and traditional fabrication techniques.

item.title: Cable Damascus Axe Forging
item.description: A blacksmithing project forging a cable Damascus axe, showcasing layered steel patterning, heat treatment, and traditional blade-making craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Cable Damascus Axe Forging
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing project forging a cable Damascus axe, showcasing layered steel patterning, heat treatment, and traditional blade-making craftsmanship.

item.title: Axe Making from Wire Rope
item.description: A blacksmithing project transforming wire rope into a forged axe, highlighting cable Damascus steel patterns, heat treatment, and traditional blade craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Axe Making from Wire Rope
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing project transforming wire rope into a forged axe, highlighting cable Damascus steel patterns, heat treatment, and traditional blade craftsmanship.
